mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_experiences (resume_id, company_name, position, location, start_date, end_date, description, achievements, sort_order) VALUES (#{resumeId}, #{companyName}, #{position}, #{location}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{description}, #{achievements}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM work_experiences WHERE id = #{id} AND resume_id = #{resumeId}
SELECT * FROM work_experiences WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM work_experiences WHERE id = #{id} AND resume_id = #{resumeId}
